findings.issue: No error handling for missing fixture file in refreshApps; loadFixtureApps throws but caller in server.js does not catch.
findings.fix: Wrap refreshApps call in server.js with try/catch and return 500 on failure.

findings.issue: POST /api/refresh does not validate mode parameter beyond allowedModes set; unsupported mode returns 500 with generic error.
findings.fix: Return 400 with descriptive error for unsupported mode before calling refreshApps.

findings.issue: No test for /api/apps/:id returning 404; only happy path tested in api-fixture.test.js.
findings.fix: Add a test case for non-existent app ID returning 404 status.

suggested_next_steps: Add error boundary in server.js for fixture load failures
Add input validation for POST /api/refresh mode parameter
Add 404 test case for single app endpoint
